subject: Enable Java 17 build: POM, tooling, test fixes
commit_message:
Enable Java 17 build: POM, tooling, test fixes

Foundation commit on the spring-boot-3-0 branch that
enables the SO reactor to build and test cleanly under
Java 17 (Temurin 17.0.18), still on Spring Boot 2.7.18.
Framework bumps (Spring Boot 3, Spring Cloud 2022.0,
Camunda 7.20, CXF 4, Hibernate 6) are NOT in this CR —
they land in subsequent phase CRs alongside per-module
Jakarta migration work.

Validated locally by `mvn clean install -Dformat.skipValidate=true`
(BUILD SUCCESS across all 47 modules; all tests pass).

- java.version: 11 -> 17
- maven-compiler-plugin: 3.8.0 -> 3.11.0
- source/target switched to ${java.version}; <release>
  flag omitted because groovy-eclipse-batch:3.0.8-01 (the
  latest available under org.codehaus.groovy) rejects
  "release version 17" but accepts source/target at 17
- maven-surefire-plugin: 3.0.0-M9 -> 3.1.2; adds argLine
  with --add-opens flags required by tests running on
  Java 17 (ModelMapper, JAXB runtime, Mockito)
- jacoco-maven-plugin: 0.8.5 (oparent default) -> 0.8.12
  (required for Java 17 bytecode class file major 61)
- maven-plugin-plugin pinned at 3.11.0 in pluginManagement
  (oparent default 3.6.0 fails on Java 17 bytecode)
- New `openrewrite` opt-in profile wiring
  rewrite-maven-plugin:5.31.0. Recipe artifacts are NOT
  preloaded; phase CRs that run recipes pass GAVs via
  -Drewrite.recipeArtifactCoordinates at invocation time.

- project-configs/code-tools/onap-eclipse-format.xml:
  Eclipse JDT compiler compliance/source/targetPlatform
  bumped from 1.8 to 17
- graph-inventory/fluent-builder-maven-plugin/pom.xml:
  maven-plugin-plugin 3.6.0 -> 3.11.0 (explicit version
  overrides oparent)
- common/utils/pom.xml: jaxb-core 2.3.0 -> 2.3.0.1
  (latest 2.3.x; no 2.3.9 exists for jaxb-core) and
  jaxb-impl 2.3.0 -> 2.3.9 (2.3.0 throws NPE on
  Injector.defineClass under Java 17)
- common/common/pom.xml: modelmapper 2.3.2 -> 3.2.6
  (2.3.2 fails to create ByteBuddy subclass proxies
  under Java 17)

- JsonUtils.jsonElementExist (MSOCoreBPMN): explicit null
  handling to preserve contract. Under Java 11 a chained
  NPE accidentally produced true; Java 14+ helpful NPEs
  (JEP 358) broke that chain.
- ExceptionBuilder (MSOCommonBPMN): stack-trace walker now
  also skips jdk.internal.reflect, sun.reflect, Method,
  and org.mockito frames. Previously these were
  transparent under Java 11, now visible under Java 17
  stricter reflection.
- ExceptionBuilderUnitTest: updated two expected-message
  strings to match the corrected caller identification
  (was relying on accidental proxy class naming of
  Mockito 4.x subclass spies).
- MSOCommonBPMN: test-resource extension
  mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker =
  mock-maker-inline. BBInputSetupTest's
  Mockito.spy(new ArrayList<>()) fails under the default
  subclass-based maker on Java 17 (constructor bypass
  leaves elementData null); inline maker fixes it.
- NetworkAdapterObjectMapper: anonymous PropertyMap inner
  class refactored to a named static nested class
  (SubnetPropertyMap). Purely a readability improvement;
  the anonymous form also works with modelmapper 3.2.6.
- NetworkAdapterObjectMapperTest: Mockito.spy(Class) ->
  Mockito.spy(new ...) for consistency (no functional
  change after modelmapper 3.2.6).

- Spring Boot 2.7.18 -> 3.0.x (requires Jakarta
  namespace migration across ~2000 javax imports and
  framework migration; not feasible as a root-POM
  only change)
- Spring Cloud, Camunda, Apache CXF, Hibernate bumps
- Jakarta namespace sweep of module source
- APPC client removal (SO-4310; appc.client.version
  property retained here so module POMs keep resolving
  until that CR lands)
- Module-level Spring Security 6, Hibernate 6, CXF 4
  migration (Phases 2-6)

Part of: SO-4307

Issue-ID: SO-4309
Change-Id: I7a29fff06fa0d23fc9c6a4a532ece4c1602f3be5
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
